trend_strategy.key_finding: Score 7 beats 9-10 — higher score means buying too late

contrarian_strategy.best_rsi: RSI 30-45 beats <30 — deeply oversold often keeps falling
contrarian_strategy.key_finding: Defensive quality with dividends mean reverts reliably. Growth tech value traps.

combined_findings.atr_stops_needed: NVDA, META, V stopped out too often on fixed 6% — need volatility-adjusted stops
combined_findings.rsi_insight_trend: Overbought RSI >70 is best TREND entry — momentum continuation
combined_findings.rsi_insight_contra: RSI 30-45 is best CONTRARIAN entry — not deeply oversold <30
combined_findings.live_ready: Both strategies show positive edge — safe to go live when ready
